feed.title: Sic, The weblog of Ali Mohamed Ali

entry.title: The first few images!
entry.summary: I try out adding images to my blog. Tested out with some doodles of mine.

entry.title: Hello world! (yet again)
entry.summary: The first blog post of Sic. I describe how I messed up all my written content with one stupid mistake. A shell command that cost me the couple of hours I spent setting up the written content.
